ch1_level2_subarea1_start.text: You stumble as you try to retrace your steps, your legs weak and trembling. Antakin rushes to your side, her eyes wide with concern.

antakin_checks_cards.mageText: Hold on… these cards… they’re tainted! How could this happen? You weren’t corrupted, and neither were the cards before…

player_headache.text: You clutch your temples, groaning. 'My head… it feels like it’s tearing itself apart!' The world tilts, and your skin burns painfully.

grab_card.text: Desperate, you snatch a card from Antakin’s deck. Your body feeling a surge of strange energy.

corruption_agony.text: The card pulses darkly in your hand. As its corruption seeps into you, agony wracks your body. Skin peels away painfully, revealing a shadowy form beneath…

mordu_reveal.text: From the darkness emerges a being with eyes that pierce through your soul. A chilling giggle echoes: it is Mordu.

mordu_1.mageText: Silly little mage... Once enveloped with power, I shall rise...

mordu_2.mageText: Don't even try, Antakin. It was very reckless of you to trust someone quickly...

mordu_attack.text: Mordu snaps your neck. You heard a glimpse of gasp before the deafening noise came. Everything around you collapses into a void of nothingness.

void_voice_3.text: In the void, nothing exists... But a faint voice whispered through.

void_voice_4.text:
'Your journey has not yet ended. Endure… 
and return to the beginning.'

ch1_level2_subarea1_end.text: Silence envelops you, the void swallowing everything. You know this is not the end—it is only a pause, a cruel reminder that the journey will continue.
